_doc: Allowlist for scripts/audit-radius.mjs. Two layers — `files` exempts whole files (use sparingly, prefer per-line escape comments). `lines` maps repo-relative paths to arrays of 1-based line numbers. Per-line escape `// audit:radius-allow <reason>` is preferred for in-source intent.
_files_doc: Geometry-by-design surfaces — game boards (cells, dice, pieces, cards), ASCII/canvas/whiteboard drawing apps, color swatches and color-input UI, and rendered-markdown/regex-template strings are intentionally outside the radius token system. They encode their own visual semantics or render user content rather than OS chrome.
